overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a snowy mountainous landscape. The character traverses a winding path from bright alpine ridges through pine forests and into a darker valley, with snow-capped peaks visible throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy alpine mountain ridge with scattered pines

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a snow-covered mountain ridge with swords on his back, moving toward the distant peaks

entered.detail: Distant snow-covered mountain peaks under bright blue sky
Tall evergreen pine trees scattered along the mountainside
Gray rock outcroppings and cliff faces
Wooden posts marking the path edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright, snow-covered alpine ridge with expansive views of distant mountain peaks. Geralt walks forward along the trail, passing scattered pine trees and rocky outcrops under clear midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain forest trail with mixed snow and grass

events.description: Entering denser pine forest causes shift from bright direct sunlight to dappled shade

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing downhill through the forest, navigating between trees as the path becomes less snowy

entered.detail: Large boulders and rock clusters along the trail
Patches of exposed grass replacing snow cover

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a denser pine forest where the lighting shifts to dappled shade. The ground transitions from snow to mixed dirt and grass, with large rock formations appearing along the path while the distant mountains remain visible through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain valley leading to darker ravine

events.description: Path enters narrow valley with steep rock walls enclosing the trail

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking deeper into the shadowed valley, approaching a darker area ahead

entered.detail: Steep rocky valley walls rising on both sides
Sheer cliff faces with patches of snow
Dark opening or shadowed ravine at the valley end

segments.scene_description: The trail descends into a narrow, shadowed valley with steep rock walls rising on both sides. The distant mountain peaks disappear from view as the character approaches a darker ravine or cave entrance ahead, with only scattered trees remaining on the valley floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a bright, open alpine ridge into the depths of a shadowed mountain valley. It begins on a snow-covered trail under a clear midday sun, moving past scattered pine trees and rocky outcrops with expansive views of distant peaks. As the character descends, the scene shifts into a denser pine forest where the lighting becomes dappled shade and the snowy ground transitions into mixed dirt and grass. The trail then leads further downward into a narrow valley with steep rock walls rising on both sides, causing the distant mountains to disappear from view. Finally, the environment opens into a dark ravine as the camera approaches a cave entrance, leaving only a few scattered trees on the valley floor.
